# Reviews HDP (Movil)

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->

## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://www.stayforlong.com/hotel/es/hotel-delfin_tossa-de-mar
2. Click on 1.124 Comentarios paragraph
3. Wait 5 seconds
4. Click read-all-reviews-button
5. Click guest comments close icon
6. Click Show more button
7. Click Services collapse icon
